tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Return the authenticated customer's profile: name, account ID, balance, primary address, and payment method status.

tools.name: lookup_scheduled_jobs
tools.description: Return the authenticated customer's upcoming scheduled jobs. Call this before rescheduling or cancelling to get the job ID.

tools.name: get_available_services
tools.description: Returns service categories and types available for a given postal or zip code, accounting for location coverage and seasonal availability. Call this after collecting the customer's postal code to determine what services to offer.

tools.name: current_datetime
tools.description: Returns the current date and time in UTC and, if a city is provided, in the local timezone. Call this before create_order to get the correct timezone offset.

tools.name: calculate_quote
tools.description: Calculate an estimated price and duration for a service WITHOUT creating a booking. Use this during the quoting phase before the customer commits.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a service order for the authenticated customer. Call calculate_quote first to get the price and recommended durationHours, then call this once the customer agrees.

tools.name: reschedule_job
tools.description: Reschedule one of the authenticated customer's upcoming jobs to a new date and time. Call lookup_scheduled_jobs first to get the job ID. Get explicit customer confirmation before setting confirmed to true.

tools.name: cancel_job
tools.description: Cancel one of the authenticated customer's upcoming jobs. Call lookup_scheduled_jobs first to get the job ID. Get explicit customer confirmation before setting confirmed to true.
